name: chronogrove
description: Chronogrove workspace: widget JSON API, provider sync, operator console (App Hosting), marketing site (classic Hosting), and Cloud Functions + Firestore.

scripts.build: NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) turbo run build
scripts.dev: NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) turbo run dev
scripts.dev:console: NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) pnpm -C apps/console dev
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n emulators,console,www -c cyan,green,yellow "firebase emulators:start --only auth,functions,firestore" "pnpm run dev:console" "pnpm run dev:www"
scripts.dev:full:fresh: pnpm run build && pnpm run dev:full
scripts.deploy:all: node scripts/guard-functions-env.cjs && pnpm run build && firebase deploy --only firestore,functions,apphosting:chronogrove-console,hosting:www
scripts.deploy:console: pnpm run build && firebase deploy --only apphosting:chronogrove-console
scripts.deploy:www: pnpm -C apps/www build && firebase deploy --only hosting:www
